summary: The Ministerial Election at the USDON Academy is underway, with seven candidates vying for the position. Verux delivers a speech promising to make discoveries like the Diamond Dragon's Den regular occurrences through his proposed systems. However, Elric Mervinger, Duke of the Shining Star and Representative of the Election, makes an unexpected appearance after the voting has concluded. He declares that Candidate Verux should be disqualified due to alleged crimes, including document forgery and attempted murder.
key_moments: Verux's speech promising to make discoveries regular occurrences
Elric Mervinger's sudden appearance at the election
Elric's declaration to disqualify Verux from the election
